glossary.application_status: Where this application sits in the funder’s pipeline. Draft = not submitted; Submitted = waiting for assignment; Under review = a reviewer is scoring; Scored = awaiting funding decision; Awarded/Rejected = final.
glossary.capacity_assessment: A structured self-assessment using a recognized framework (Kuja, STEP, UN-HACT, CHS, NUPAS) that scores your organization across capacity, governance, finance, and programs. Donors weight this when reviewing applications.
glossary.compliance: Continuous checks: sanctions screening (UN/OFAC/EU), government registry verification, and grant reporting status. Donors see a green/amber/red posture per grantee.
glossary.eligibility: The conditions your organization must meet before applying — country, sector, registration, budget size, etc. The donor sets these.
glossary.readiness_score: A 0-100 score of how competitive your next grant application is likely to be. Updated automatically as your documents, applications, and capacity change.
glossary.rubric: The scoring framework reviewers use. Each criterion has a weight; the weighted total becomes your application score.

proximate.intervention.reason_placeholde: e.g. SOP 13 §4 — concern raised by field officer about aid diversion
proximate.intervention.title: Intervention register
proximate.nominate.contact_hint: At least one — phone OR email — so Adeso can reach you.
proximate.nominate.contact_required: Please share at least one contact — phone or email.
proximate.nominate.field_description_pla: A few sentences about who you serve and what you do. No need to be formal.
proximate.nominate.privacy_note: Adeso uses what you share here only to evaluate your group for Proximate funding. We never sell or share your details.
proximate.nominate.received_body: Adeso will review and reach out by phone or email within a few days. No action needed from you right now.
proximate.nominate.received_title: Thank you — we have your nomination.
proximate.nominate.submit_failed: Could not submit. Please check your connection and try again.
proximate.nominate.subtitle: No login required. Adeso will review and contact you if your group is a fit for the next Proximate funding round.
proximate.nominate.title: Tell Adeso about your community group
proximate.outcome.ack_placeholder: A short acknowledgement the partner will see next visit
proximate.outcome.load_failed: We could not load this attestation. The link may have expired.
proximate.outcome.missing_token: This link is missing its access code. Please re-open the link you received.
proximate.outcome.q1_hint: Compare to the count you reported 90 days ago. Honest numbers are more useful than perfect ones.
proximate.outcome.q1_still_in_state: Of the people you said you helped, how many are still in the same state today?
proximate.outcome.q2_placeholder: e.g. the shelter is still standing; the clinic still runs
proximate.outcome.q2_sustained: What part of this support has lasted?
proximate.outcome.q3_not_sustained: What did NOT last, and what would you do differently?
proximate.outcome.q3_placeholder: Honest answers help us fund better next time
proximate.outcome.q4_counterfactual: What would have happened without this disbursement?
proximate.outcome.q4_counterfactual_hint: Think honestly about the alternative path. This helps us learn whether the support was decisive.
proximate.outcome.q4_counterfactual_plac: e.g. We had no other source of cash this month; without this, families would have moved.
proximate.outcome.share_link_hint: Share this link with the partner when the 90-day mark approaches.
proximate.outcome.submit_failed: We could not submit. Please try again.
proximate.outcome.subtitle: Three short questions about whether the support is still helping.
proximate.outcome.thanks_body: Adeso will read this. You may hear back if there is a follow-up question.
proximate.outcome.title: How did it go, 90 days on?
proximate.outcome.verdict_note_placehold: Optional notes — what you accept, what needs follow-up
proximate.partner.footer_keep_link_safe: Keep this link private. Anyone with this URL can see your records.
proximate.partner.load_failed: We could not load your portal. The link may have expired.
proximate.partner.missing_token: This link is missing its access code. Re-open the link you received.
proximate.partner.pending_obligations_bo: item(s) need your action — see below.
proximate.partner.sanctions_flag_body: This partner appears on one or more screening lists. Resolve before clearing for disbursement.
proximate.register.coi_explainer: Endorsement gives small Sudanese groups access to aid without registration paperwork. As an endorser, your honesty is everything.
proximate.register.coi_section_help: These help us flag when you might be too close to a group you are endorsing. Honest disclosure is fine — it does not disqualify you; it only records context.
proximate.register.pending_review: The secretariat will review your registration soon. You will be notified when approved.
proximate.register.subtitle: Vouch for community groups in your area so they can receive aid.
proximate.register.title: Become a Proximate endorser
proximate.register.you_can_endorse: You can now endorse partners from the Proximate inbox.
proximate.report.load_failed: Could not load the report. The link may have expired.
proximate.report.missing_token: Report link is missing. Open the link from the message Adeso sent you.
proximate.report.q2_people_helped: How many people did it help?
proximate.report.q3_placeholder: Roads, security, delays, anything Adeso should know.
proximate.report.q4_attachment_coming: Photo or voice note attachment coming soon. For now, describe in the issues field.
proximate.report.q4_attachment_hint: A photo of the activity or a short voice note helps Adeso verify what happened. Tap the button below — your phone will open the camera or microphone.
proximate.report.q5_placeholder: Brief breakdown if you can. No exact receipts needed.
proximate.report.submit_failed: Could not send. Try again in a moment.
proximate.report.thanks_body: Adeso will review it shortly. You can close this page.
proximate.report.title: Report on this funding
proximate.report.upload_failed: Could not upload. Try a smaller file or check your connection.
proximate.result.cleared_subtitle: Tier 1 relational validation complete. The Proximate secretariat will be notified.
proximate.result.coi_flagged_subtitle: Conflict of interest detected ({n} signals). Your answer is logged for the record but does not count toward the trust threshold.
proximate.result.queued_subtitle: Your endorsement will be sent when your phone reconnects to the internet.
proximate.result.recorded_subtitle: Thank you. Another endorsement is still needed before this partner clears.
proximate.round_report.no_disbursements: No disbursements recorded for this round.
proximate.round_report.subtitle: End-of-round closing package
proximate.rounds.admin_cannot_sign: Signing is for OB roster members only — you are signed in as platform admin.
proximate.rounds.closing_pack_sub: Artifacts the OB and donors receive at the end of the round.
proximate.rounds.closing_summary: Closing summary (what got disbursed, key outcomes)
proximate.rounds.empty: No rounds yet. Click "New round" to start a cycle.
proximate.rounds.new_subtitle: Draft the round, then submit for 2 OB signers to activate.
proximate.rounds.next_step_hint: After drafting, submit the round for signature. 2 OB members must affirm before it goes active.
proximate.rounds.no_activity: No proximate.* audit rows in this window yet.
proximate.rounds.no_disbursements_yet: No disbursements yet. Click "Record disbursement" to send the first one.
proximate.rounds.pack_locked_until_activ: Available once the round is active.
proximate.rounds.pack_locked_until_close: Available once the round is closed (90 days after first disbursement).
proximate.rounds.pack_retro_after_close: Available 180 days after the round closes.
proximate.rounds.subtitle: Each round is a funding cycle: trigger, donor, envelope, OB sign-off. Every action between activation and close is tagged to the round for end-of-cycle reporting.
proximate.rounds.title: Funding rounds
proximate.rounds.trigger_summary_placeho: Brief context for the round — what triggered it, what is the urgency.
proximate.rounds.you_already_responded: You already responded on this round.
proximate.verify.attest_body: Based on what you know from the ground, do you confirm what Adeso recorded, or do you dispute it?
proximate.verify.context_title: What you are being asked to verify
proximate.verify.footer_keep_link_safe: Keep this link private. It is your one-time attestation key.
proximate.verify.load_failed: We could not load the verification.
proximate.verify.missing_token: This link is missing its access code.
proximate.verify.notes_placeholder: Optional notes (what you saw, who you spoke to)
proximate.verify.submit_failed: Could not save your attestation. Please try again.
proximate.verify.title: Third-party attestation
proximate.voice.placeholder: Tap record to speak your reasoning, or type here.
proximate.wizard.instructions: Answer three short questions about this group. Your answers are checked for conflict of interest automatically.
pwa.install.body: Adds an icon to your home screen. Opens straight to today's priorities, works briefly offline.
pwa.install.title: Install Kuja for faster access
ranking.title: Application Rankings
readiness.applied_toast: Rewrite applied — review the change before submitting.
readiness.concrete_alt: Concrete alternative anchored in your work
readiness.fallback_notice: AI pre-flight is offline — we ran a basic check. Re-run when AI is available.
readiness.gaps_subtitle: Sorted by impact. Items marked 'blocker' need attention before submit; everything else lifts your score.
readiness.missing_evidence: Evidence that would lift your score
readiness.scanning: Scanning your application for gaps, weak answers, and overclaims…
readiness.title: Submission readiness
report.ai_guidance_subtitle: Get AI feedback on your report section
report.calendar_subtitle: Visual overview of upcoming report deadlines
report.no_reports_hint: Reports will appear once you have awarded grants with reporting requirements.
report.precheck_gaps: Where to add a bit more
report.precheck_no_requirements: No specific donor requirements set — AI used a general report rubric.
report.precheck_subtitle: Let's check your draft against the donor's expectations before you submit — better to fix gaps now than face a revision request later.
report.title: Reports
report_coauthor.heading: AI report draft
report_coauthor.notes_placeholder: e.g. We trained 60 new CHWs in Q3 across 3 counties. Attendance sheets uploaded. Two scheduled trainings were postponed due to election logistics.
report_coauthor.subtitle: Add a few notes about what happened this period — meetings, milestones, beneficiary numbers. AI will draft every section grounded in your prior reports + uploaded documents, and flag any gaps that need evidence.
report_readiness.intro: A donor-perspective scan of your report before you submit — concerns flagged, vague claims sharpened, missing evidence surfaced. Saves a bounceback.
report_readiness.scanning: Scanning your report from a donor's perspective…
report_readiness.title: Report readiness
review.compare_running: AI is comparing the selected applications…
review.compare_select_max: Compare up to 5 applications at once
review.compare_select_min: Select at least 2 applications to compare
review.completed.empty_body: Reviews you complete will be listed here for reference.
review.completed.subtitle: Reviews you've submitted. Pending donor decisions until awards finalize.
review.detail.evidence_no_criteria_body: This grant has no evaluation criteria defined, so criterion-by-criterion evidence extraction does not apply here. Add criteria to the grant to enable this feature.
review.detail.no_criteria: No evaluation criteria defined for this grant.
review.detail.no_documents: No documents uploaded for this application.
review.detail.no_responses: No responses available for this application.
review.detail.score_intro: Score each criterion below (0-100). The weighted total updates automatically.
review.detail.scores_recorded: Your review has been recorded successfully.
review.no_apps_donor_body: Applications will appear here as NGOs submit them.
review.no_completed_body: Reviews you complete will appear here.
review.no_pending_body: You have no applications to review right now.
review.title: Review
reviewer_actions.empty: You're all caught up. Nice work.
reviewer_actions.title: Your assignments
reviewer_briefing.sparse: Application is too sparse to generate a useful briefing yet. Wait for the NGO to fill in more before scoring.
reviewer_briefing.subtitle: AI reads the submission + grant criteria and surfaces the 3–5 questions most worth testing. Helps panel consistency without dictating verdicts.
reviewer_briefing.title: What to probe before scoring
reviewer_briefing.unavailable: Briefing is unavailable right now. You can still score manually.
reviewer_summary.decision_changers_hint: Specific evidence that would shift the score — useful for follow-up before scoring.
reviewer_summary.editable_note: Edit before submitting — your judgment is the final word.
reviewer_summary.intro: One-screen executive read of this application — extracted evidence per criterion plus a draft rationale you can edit instead of writing from scratch.
reviewer_summary.rationale_used: Rationale pasted into the highest-weighted criterion
reviewer_summary.title: AI summary
risk_register.no_response: No mitigation plan yet — add one to start working this risk.
risk_register.response_placeholder: Describe how this risk is being addressed…
risk_register.title: Risk register
score_breakdown.empty: No component data available for this score.
score_breakdown.title: How your overall score is built
score_breakdown.tooltip: Click to see how this score breaks down
security.codes_body: These ten codes work once each. Use them if you lose access to your authenticator. They will not be shown again — store them somewhere safe.
security.disable_body: Disabling 2FA weakens your account. Only do this if you're rotating to a new device. Enter your current 6-digit code to confirm.
security.disable_confirm: Disable 2FA on this account? This weakens account security.
security.not_enrolled_body: Admin accounts should enroll to protect tenant data. Enrollment takes about 60 seconds with any authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password).
security.scan_body: Open your authenticator app and scan the URL below — or paste the secret manually. Then enter the 6-digit code your app generates to confirm.
security.subtitle: Two-factor authentication for your admin account.
security.title: Security
security.unavailable_body: The pyotp dependency isn't installed on this server. Reinstall the backend with `pip install pyotp` and redeploy.
server.error.ai.invalid_input: AI request is missing required input.
server.error.ai.rate_limited: Too many AI requests. Please wait a moment.
server.error.ai.unavailable: AI is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
server.error.application.cannot_modify: This application can no longer be modified.
server.error.auth.access_denied: You don't have permission to do this.
server.error.auth.account_locked: Account locked. Try again in a few minutes.
server.error.auth.too_many_attempts: Too many login attempts. Please wait a few minutes before trying again.
server.error.grant.already_applied: Your organization has already applied to this grant.
server.error.grant.not_open: This grant is not currently accepting applications.
server.error.review.not_assigned: You are not assigned to this review.
server.error.server.unexpected: Something went wrong. We've logged this and will investigate.
server.error.upload.docx_unreadable: Could not read the Word document. It may be corrupted.
server.error.upload.empty_file: File is empty or too small to contain valid content.
server.error.upload.no_text: No readable text found. The document may be empty, scanned, or corrupted.
server.error.upload.pdf_no_pages: PDF has no pages. Please upload a valid PDF document.
server.error.upload.pdf_unreadable: Could not read the PDF file. It may be corrupted or password-protected.
server.error.upload.too_large: File too large. Maximum size is {max_mb} MB.
shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
status.app.under_review.coaching: A reviewer is reading your application
status.ngo.draft: In draft — keep going when you can
status.ngo.rejected: Not awarded this round — feedback coming soon
status.ngo.under_review: A reviewer is reading your application now
this_week.empty: You're all caught up — nothing flagged for this week.
this_week.title: This week
timeline.empty: No activity recorded yet. Events will appear here as the application progresses.
timeline.title: Everything that's happened
toast.add_revision_notes: Please add notes explaining what revisions are needed.
toast.ai_draft_failed: AI could not draft this section right now.
toast.ai_draft_improved: AI rewrote your draft to be sharper
toast.ai_draft_started: AI drafted a starting answer for you
toast.ai_extracted_reqs: AI extracted {count} reporting requirements from your document.
toast.ai_extracted_reqs_indicators: AI extracted {req_count} reporting requirements and {ind_count} indicators
toast.ai_guidance_unavailable: AI guidance unavailable right now. Please try again.
toast.ai_scaffold_designed: AI designed {count} items — review, edit, and continue
toast.ai_scaffold_failed: AI scaffold failed. Please add criteria manually.
toast.ai_scaffold_no_match: AI scaffold returned but no items matched your wizard fields
toast.ai_scaffold_unavailable: AI scaffold unavailable. Please add criteria manually.
toast.ai_suggestions_applied: AI suggestions applied to your response
toast.app_created_review: Application created. Please review and submit.
toast.application_submit_failed: Failed to submit application. Please try again.
toast.confirm_eligibility_required: Please confirm all required eligibility items before proceeding
toast.doc_uploaded_no_reqs: Document uploaded but no requirements could be extracted. You can add them manually below.
toast.draft_save_failed: Failed to save draft before upload
toast.eligibility_unconfirmed: Some required eligibility items are not confirmed
toast.enter_report_title: Please enter a report title before submitting.
toast.enter_reporting_period: Please enter the reporting period before submitting.
toast.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
toast.file_too_large: File too large. Maximum size is 16 MB.
toast.fill_content_section: Please fill in at least one content section before submitting.
toast.fill_required_fields: Please fill in the highlighted required fields ({count} missing)
toast.grant_created_publish_later: Grant created. You can publish it later.
toast.grant_publish_no_grant: No grant to publish. Please complete the wizard first.
toast.network_error: Network error. Please check your connection.
toast.no_awarded_grants: No awarded grants found. You need an awarded grant to submit reports.
toast.no_verification_record: No verification record found. Run verification first.
toast.profile_imported_proposal: Organization profile imported into relevant responses
toast.revision_requested: Revision requested. The grantee will be notified.
toast.upload_required_docs: Please upload all required documents before submitting
tour.admin.s1.body: Anomaly stream flags unusual patterns — spikes in declined apps, slow review queues, suspicious verification results.
tour.admin.s1.title: Operations at a glance
tour.admin.s2.body: Every AI call across the platform is logged — success rate, tokens, per-endpoint breakdowns. Catch regressions before users notice.
tour.admin.s2.title: Live AI health panel
tour.admin.s3.body: Compliance trust panel, audit timelines, typed-confirmation on destructive actions — this is the platform a board can trust to run a fund.
tour.admin.s3.title: Configure and trust
tour.donor.s1.body: Today's verdict synthesizes the 3-5 things that need your attention this week — AI-derived from your actual grants, applications, and risk signals.
tour.donor.s1.title: Your portfolio command center
tour.donor.s2.body: Every chart has a "so what" caption written by AI. Scan a dashboard in 10 seconds, not 10 minutes.
tour.donor.s2.title: Charts with AI insight captions
tour.donor.s3.body: Tap the sparkle on the right edge anytime. Ask Co-pilot about portfolio health, write a new RFP, or scan for patterns across declined applications.
tour.donor.s3.title: Co-pilot is always a click away
tour.donor.s4.body: Under "Create grant," Kuja suggests eligibility criteria, rubric weights, and reporting requirements tuned to your goal + thematic + geography.
tour.donor.s4.title: Design grants with AI
tour.near.admin.console.body: This is your control panel: membership pipeline, active declarations, the Change Fund pulse, and the Crisis Monitoring Report at a glance.
tour.near.admin.console.title: {network} operator console
tour.near.admin.crisis.body: The OB reviews active crises weekly. Rows with a high composite score (HDI + government capacity + people impacted + attention level) become declaration candidates.
tour.near.admin.crisis.title: Crisis monitoring
tour.near.admin.declarations.body: Multi-signature with COI recusal — every signature is audit-anchored. Activated declarations auto-create shortlisted grants ready for release.
tour.near.admin.declarations.title: Emergency declarations
tour.near.admin.memberships.body: New applications need OB review. Run the trust process (sanctions, registry, adverse media) and check the capacity assessment before approving.
tour.near.admin.memberships.title: Membership reviews
tour.near.donor.welcome.body: {network} is its own donor: there's no separate donor role here. Use the operator console to manage funds.
tour.near.donor.welcome.title: Welcome to {network}
tour.near.ngo.capacity.body: The capacity framework drives your eligibility. Take it during onboarding and refresh annually — the Oversight Body sees your score.
tour.near.ngo.capacity.title: Capacity assessment
tour.near.ngo.compliance.body: Reports are grouped by grant. Submit progress, financial, and final reports straight from each grant card; deadlines are colour-coded.
tour.near.ngo.compliance.title: Compliance & reporting
tour.near.ngo.copilot.body: Ask anything about your obligations, declarations you can apply to, or how to read your scores.
tour.near.ngo.copilot.title: Co-pilot
tour.near.ngo.welcome.body: You're a member of this network. This dashboard surfaces your active grants, what's due, and where the network needs you.
tour.near.ngo.welcome.title: Welcome to {network}
tour.near.reviewer.welcome.body: {network} is a closed network — reviewers operate through the OB workflow rather than independent panels.
tour.near.reviewer.welcome.title: Welcome to {network}
tour.ngo.s1.body: A 0–100 signal of how competitive your next application is likely to be. AI updates this as your documents, applications, and capacity change.
tour.ngo.s1.title: Your readiness score
tour.ngo.s2.body: The three actions here are ranked by impact on your readiness score — with estimated uplift per action.
tour.ngo.s2.title: AI-coached next actions
tour.ngo.s3.body: Every grant shows your AI-estimated fit + win probability + what's missing from your profile. Focus where you'll win.
tour.ngo.s3.title: Browse grants smart
tour.ngo.s4.body: Stuck on a section? Tap the sparkle. Co-pilot grounds every suggestion in your own past applications — never generic.
tour.ngo.s4.title: Co-pilot writes with you
tour.reviewer.s1.body: Your assignments are ranked by review priority — deadline, complexity, and similarity to prior high-scoring apps.
tour.reviewer.s1.title: AI-prioritized queue
tour.reviewer.s2.body: Select 2–5 applications to compare side-by-side. AI aligns strengths, weaknesses, and flags potentially coordinated submissions.
tour.reviewer.s2.title: Compare mode
tour.reviewer.s3.body: AI pre-fills rationale per rubric criterion using application content. You edit and confirm — much faster than writing cold.
tour.reviewer.s3.title: Justify every score
trust_gap.disclaimer: Lift estimates are AI projections, not guarantees. Quick wins first.
trust_gap.subtitle: AI reads your two pillars + sub-components and prioritises the highest-leverage actions.
trust_gap.title: How to lift your trust score
twofa_nag.body: Admin accounts should enroll in 2FA to protect tenant data.
twofa_nag.title: Two-factor authentication recommended.
verification.intro_body: Green: registry-confirmed and trustworthy. Amber: AI-parsed with high confidence — a human should still confirm. Red: flagged or unverified — review before proceeding.
verification.search_placeholder: Search by org, country, reg number…
verification.subtitle: Verify organization registrations across {n} supported countries
verification.title: Registration verification
voice.help: Browser speech recognition. Stays on-device for English / French / Spanish / Arabic / Swahili; Somali falls back to typed input.
voice.listening: Listening — your words append to the field
voice.title: Speak this field instead of typing
